transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I have 3kg of beef
It's from one of my favorite meat stores
They sell really high-quality meats
Is this used to oil the grill?
Can I eat this?
Wipe the grill with it?
Sirloin
Top Flank
Check the marbling on it
Will it focus on the meat if I cover my face?
That looks so good
Hot!
Here's the scissor
The owner gave me this

It's not even cooked yet and it cuts like butter
Lower the heat!
[Chat: It's so painful to watch this at this hour]
Bon appetit
Top flank first
It's so good It's ready
Here's the sirloin
Top flank was amazing
It's even better than the chuck flap
How can it be this delicious?
Crazy
I like it rare/medium-rare
These are well-done but still amazing
I cooked it too much
Right, I need to try this too The owner's recommendation
It's a new dish

Soybean Stew
Scallion Salad? It tastes good
Stack on top
Fire!
I need to keep eating
I forgot to put the bowl for the grease
The red part of the sirloin
It's even more red, but it's been sitting here for a while
Sirloin
Should we try these rib fingers?
[Chat: I don't like the sirloin because it's too chewy]
It's not chewy at all I don't like sirloin that much either
That cuts like butter
I need to eat it now! I like it rare
It's so tender
This scissor works so well Even if they're not cooked

Rib fingers (finger meat)
Looks so good
The rib fingers have a very distinct smell
Every part has its own scent
But this rib finger scent is very nice
The texture is totally different too
Is it like this?
That's so cool
It got cooked!
Go back in!
So good
[Chat: What part of steak are you eating?]
Top flank, chuck flap, sirloin, tenderloin, and rib fingers
Wow, I'm so good at memorizing food items
Let's eat the chuck flap now
This kept sticking out

The marbling is very similar to the top flank
I haven't had the chuck flap yet
A couple of tenderloins
The scissor works so well,
But my arm hurts
Let's eat the tenderloin first If I can find it
It's this one Wait, no
This one!
Now for the chuck flap
That was the tenderloin
They all look the same
The sauce is very good
I like the veggies too
Oh no! Salt
Salty..
Let's get the heat back on

It's so big
Whatever
Heat off!
This is the sirloin
This is the chuck flap
This is the top flank
Let's compare it for real this time
The salt! It's all over
I'm dumb!
I wanted to get the salt out and put it in the sauce
So good
The owner's recommendations are so tasty The top flank
Chuck flap is amazing Really
2 pieces Wait no, let's eat some sirloin
The chuck flap is so good
I got you

3 pieces
Focus please
I misspoke about the tenderloin
It doesn't taste too good if it's cooked for too long
It's good because it's not well-done
Too hot
It feels even hotter because I have a scar here
I should've brought more
Should I bring more?
[Chat is surprised she is eating vegetables] It's not a big deal~
For the tenderness rankings,
The tenderloin was so tender when it was cooked rare
Wait no, it was a different kind of tenderness
It was a very solid feeling when chewing
Chuck flap and the other parts really melt in my mouth
I'll bring more vegetables

I have been wrong this whole time
I was saying the wrong meat
It wasn't top flank, it was thin flank
I was wrong
Please edit it for me
I will say it and you can use that audio to cover it
"This is the thin flank"
There you go
It looks too good I want to save it
Let's cook it
The fire needs to turn off now
And it's perfect
The heat goes for a long time
It's so tasty
Jingu (her cat) keeps following me everywhere
Even to the restroom

So I think he likes it up there when I'm doing mukbangs
The thin flank is really delicious
3 pieces
It's so yummy
Can you hear the meat juice?
It's our last batch
That's too bad..
So good
Give it to Jingu? He won't eat it
I can try
He's eating it
He usually doesn't
He's been eating really well after his surgery Before, he didn't really eat
He eats well now
You want more? Did you come down to have more?
I'll give you

He thinks he's sneaky about it
He pauses when we make eye contact
And snatches it so I won't notice
This one is Jingu's
Okay no more
Go down
Now they're just straight forward about it
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
